initial_candidates.sql:
WITH ordered_sessions AS (
  SELECT 
    session,
    path,
    stamp,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp ASC) AS rn_asc,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp DESC) AS rn_desc
  FROM activity_log
),
landing_pages AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT session, path AS page
  FROM ordered_sessions
  WHERE rn_asc = 1
),
exit_pages AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT session, path AS page
  FROM ordered_sessions
  WHERE rn_desc = 1
),
landing_or_exit AS (
  SELECT page FROM landing_pages
  UNION
  SELECT page FROM exit_pages
)
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM landing_or_exit;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session, path, 
           MIN(stamp) OVER (PARTITION BY session) AS first_stamp,
           MAX(stamp) OVER (PARTITION BY session) AS last_stamp
    FROM activity_log
) 
WHERE stamp = first_stamp OR stamp = last_stamp;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_landing OR is_exit THEN session END) AS total_sessions
FROM (
    SELECT 
        session,
        path,
        stamp,
        MIN(stamp) OVER (PARTITION BY session) = stamp AS is_landing,
        MAX(stamp) OVER (PARTITION BY session) = stamp AS is_exit
    FROM activity_log
) AS session_pages
GROUP BY session, path;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) AS total_unique_sessions
FROM (
    SELECT session, path
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            session, 
            path, 
            stamp,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp ASC) AS rn_asc,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp DESC) AS rn_desc
        FROM activity_log
    ) AS ranked
    WHERE rn_asc = 1 OR rn_desc = 1
) AS landing_or_exit
GROUP BY session, path;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session, path
    FROM (
        SELECT session, path, stamp,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp ASC) AS rn_asc,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp DESC) AS rn_desc
        FROM activity_log
    ) t
    WHERE rn_asc = 1 OR rn_desc = 1
) t2;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session, path
    FROM (
        SELECT session, path, stamp,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp ASC) AS rn_asc,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp DESC) AS rn_desc
        FROM activity_log
    ) t
    WHERE rn_asc = 1 OR rn_desc = 1
) t2;

candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) AS total_sessions
FROM (
    SELECT session, path
    FROM activity_log
    WHERE stamp = (
        SELECT MIN(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log al2 
        WHERE al2.session = activity_log.session
    )
    UNION
    SELECT session, path
    FROM activity_log
    WHERE stamp = (
        SELECT MAX(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log al2 
        WHERE al2.session = activity_log.session
    )
) AS landing_or_exit_pages;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) AS total_sessions
FROM (
    SELECT session, path
    FROM activity_log
    WHERE stamp = (
        SELECT MIN(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log a2 
        WHERE a2.session = activity_log.session
    )
    UNION
    SELECT session, path
    FROM activity_log
    WHERE stamp = (
        SELECT MAX(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log a2 
        WHERE a2.session = activity_log.session
    )
) AS landing_or_exit_pages;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session, path
    FROM activity_log al1
    WHERE stamp = (
        SELECT MIN(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log al2 
        WHERE al2.session = al1.session
    )
    OR stamp = (
        SELECT MAX(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log al2 
        WHERE al2.session = al1.session
    )
) t;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session, path
    FROM activity_log al1
    WHERE stamp = (
        SELECT MIN(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log al2 
        WHERE al2.session = al1.session
    )
    OR stamp = (
        SELECT MAX(stamp) 
        FROM activity_log al2 
        WHERE al2.session = al1.session
    )
) t;
